errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: The signer is not authorized for this action.

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: The supplied token mint is not the configured $GROW mint.

errors.name: PlotEmpty
errors.msg: The plot has no active plant.

errors.name: ShopExpired
errors.msg: The shop rotation is expired or not active.

errors.name: ShopOutOfStock
errors.msg: The shop item is out of stock.

errors.name: MaxBuyReached
errors.msg: The per-user buy limit has been reached.

errors.name: TradeNotConfirmed
errors.msg: The trade is not confirmed by both users.

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: This reward or action has already been claimed.
